logs.notes_full:
[FLAG 2026-04-18 Agnes/Claude review]
Photo attached to this log was reviewed on 2026-04-18. Agnes confirmed the photo is NOT Coriander — PlantNet top-3 were Conopodium majus, Coriandrum sativum, Aethusa cynapium (all Apiaceae). Could be Fool's parsley (invasive, toxic in AU), wild carrot, or similar. Leah's 06:33 submission created the Coriander plant asset + this log based on the mis-ID. Needs field recheck — confirm species, then either (a) correct the plant asset's species and rename, or (b) archive the phantom Coriander and create the correct species. Photo retained on log as evidence.
